quoteFirst: At day-break of the 26th, we had sight of _Pulo Lubek_, bearing N.E. by E. eight leagues off, wind at W. by N. We steered E. by S. in thirty-four and thirty-five fathoms; and
quoteLast: saw land bearing S.E. and S.E. by S. the before-named island now bearing N.E. by N. At noon our latitude was 6° 12' S. and our course twenty-two leagues E. and E. by N. By four p.m. _Pulo Lubek_ bore W. by N. nine leagues off, and our depth was thirty-four fathoms.
